title: Red Riding Hood (Opening)
summary: Classic storybook opening, voiced by a gentle narrator. Perfect for bedtime audio.
prompt: Once upon a time, there was a sweet little girl who lived at the edge of a great wood. She wore a bright red cloak with a hood, and everyone called her Little Red Riding Hood. One bright morning, her mother said: "Take this basket of cakes and a small pot of butter to your grandmother. She has been unwell. Stay on the path, and do not stop for anyone."
